response.step_by_step_log:
1. Watched the video and identified two segments: a talk/intro (00:00-00:41) and a performance (00:41-04:59). 
2. Identified the song title as 'サクラあっぱれーしょん' from on-screen text, with 'Tamaya 2060% (Wienners)' as the composer and 'Dempagumi.inc' as the original artist. 
3. Performed a search using '"サクラあっぱれーしょん" Wienners Japanese and English lyrics' to find the lyrics. 
4. Compiled the information into the JSON format.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D concert performance of 'Sakura Appare-tion' by Natsuiro Matsuri, Himemori Luna, Momosuzu Nene, and Shirakami Fubuki for Natsuiro Matsuri's birthday festival. The performance is preceded by a short talk by Natsuiro Matsuri.

scenes.description: Natsuiro Matsuri gives an introduction talk before the song starts.
Natsuiro Matsuri, Himemori Luna, Momosuzu Nene, and Shirakami Fubuki perform the song 'Sakura Appare-tion' on a 3D concert stage. Text overlay indicates the song title and composer at the start.
scenes.song_title: サクラあっぱれーしょん
scenes.performer_in_video: Natsuiro Matsuri, Himemori Luna, Momosuzu Nene, Shirakami Fubuki
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Hey yo, D.E.M.P.A from Akihabara to everywhere
さあさあ寄ってらっしゃい見てらっしゃい
もう一切合切やっちゃいな
ありったけのカワイイと楽しい事詰め込んで
さあ少年少女よ船に乗っていざ出航じゃ
Hey yo, D.E.M.P.A from Akihabara to everywhere
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey yo, D.E.M.P.A from Akihabara to everywhere
Come on, come on, step right up and see
Just do it all, everything and anything
Pack it full of all the cute and fun things you can
Come on, boys and girls, get on the ship and set sail
Hey yo, D.E.M.P.A from Akihabara to everywhere
